# Agent Trust Gate™

Pre-action clearing for AI agents before they access data, spend money, call tools, or trigger external actions.

## Currently available
Local fake-agent demonstrations and machine-readable review artifacts.

## Disabled
Public API, live endpoint, real agents, payment, billing, tracking, deployment, publishing, and action execution.

## Interpretation
Local discovery metadata only; not a callable service. Gareth approval is required before publishing or live access.

Quantum-readiness is positioning only. No quantum-security, PQC-compliance, legal, compliance, or audit certification is claimed.
